title: neillia thibetica
intro: Neillia thibetica, also known as Tibetian neillia, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Neillia thibetica include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and acting as a diuretic to help with urinary problems. Herbal preparations of Neillia thibetica typically involve drying the plant's leaves and roots, then infusing them in hot water to make a tea, or using them in the form of capsules or tinctures.
